---
title: "Research"
---

## Research Interests
**Political Science**: Political Behavior, Japanese Politics

**Methods**: Quantitative Methods,  Causal Inference, Survey

## Work in Progress

- Natural Disasters and Political Corruption: Evidence from Cross-national Panel Data
Analysis


- External Criticism and Public Attitude toward Unpopular Policy: Evidence from a Survey Experiment on the Discharge of ALPS Treated Water in Japan

- Legislative, Party and cabinet Positions and Electoral Outcome

- Public Reaction and Unilateral Action: Evidence from Survey Experiment in Japan
